name: skills-house
description: Framework for building agentic, skill-based software with Agent Skills — by al4f.
author: al4f <https://al4f.dev>

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @skills-house/build build && pnpm --filter @skills-house/install build && pnpm --filter @skills-house/create build && pnpm --filter "./skills/*" build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @skills-house/build test && pnpm --filter @skills-house/install test && pnpm --filter @skills-house/create test && pnpm --filter @skills-house/registry test && node --test scripts/pack.test.mjs scripts/parse-release-tag.test.mjs
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter "./skills/*" run validate --if-present && pnpm --filter "./scripts/*" run validate --if-present && pnpm --filter @skills-house/build validate && pnpm --filter @skills-house/registry validate
